title: Washing Machine Door Lock Interlock for Hotpoint Indesit C00306612
features: WE STRONGLY RECOMMEND YOU REMOVE THE PART THAT IS FAULTY AND CHECK IT AGAINST THE PHOTOGRAPHS IN THE LISTING PRIOR TO ORDERING. MANUFACTURERS OFTEN CHANGE THE DESIGN AND COMPONENTS OF THEIR APPLIANCES WITHOUT CHANGING THE MODEL NUMBERS AND THIS IS BEYOND OUR CONTROL.
Manufacturers names and model numbers are used for reference only. This is a compatible part.
